description: Create a GitLab CI pipeline using the phunehehe/nix:16.09 Docker image. Define the default test stage and four jobs: cabal, casperjs, eslint, and hlint. Each job runs the shell command ./test/test.sh <job-name> (cabal, casperjs, eslint, hlint respectively). The cabal job also uploads ./foomail.cabal as an artifact. No caches, variables, services, or rules are defined.
